Package org.finos.fluxnova.connect.httpclient.impl

Class HttpResponseImpl

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.connect.impl.AbstractConnectorResponse

public class HttpResponseImpl extends AbstractCloseableConnectorResponse implements HttpResponse
